summary:
PROPHETIC WARNINGS AND MINISTRY FAILURES: Brandon recounts a vision where the Lord revealed that many prominent ministers and prophetic voices are unaware of impending events because their spiritual hearing has been compromised by worldly pressure and pride. Brandon explains that these individuals mistakenly believe they can stop certain inevitable events through prayer, ignoring God's warnings to pause and listen to a new plan. According to Brandon, these ministries started with pure intentions but gradually allowed ego and worldly mixtures to cloud their focus, losing their vertical connection with God. Consequently, their spiritual reception is out of tune, preventing them from hearing God's complete message from the throne room and leaving them with a restricted, partial view of the future.

IMPENDING JUDGMENT AND THE SHIFT IN ANOINTING: Brandon shares a divine warning that great darkness is approaching, but God is unable to use many current prophets to deliver warnings due to their compromised state and focus on fame. Brandon conveys the Lord's revelation that a significant cleansing will occur in 2025 and 2026, during which many established ministries will collapse like a house of cards, exposing hidden darkness. Brandon draws a parallel to the biblical story of Saul and David, noting that the anointing has departed from current compromised leaders who lost themselves in ego and money, shifting instead to a new generation of faithful servants. Brandon emphasizes his personal commitment to remaining a humble vessel, deflecting all glory back to God like a mirror, and avoiding the traps of public platforms.

URGENCY OF THE END TIMES AND CLOSING WINDOW OF FREEDOM: Brandon delivers a message that time is running out, the door to the metaphorical Ark is closing, and Jesus is returning soon. Brandon states that the Lord informed him the current window for freely sharing messages on the internet will abruptly end in the near future, estimating this closure within four to five years. Brandon urges listeners to act as vessels to reach their own families and communities before this freedom of speech is permanently revoked.

PERSONAL TRIALS AND FAITH AMIDST HARDSHIP: Brandon shares a personal account of his family's ongoing struggles, specifically mentioning his wife Diana and their non-verbal autistic daughter, Megan. Brandon recounts that God challenged their faith by asking if they trust Him regarding their daughter's condition, prompting Brandon to acknowledge the difficulty of not seeing a natural resolution while choosing to maintain belief. Brandon uses this personal experience to address others facing prolonged hardships, encouraging them to persevere through their difficulties without pretense. Brandon concludes his message by stating his prayers for the salvation of Elon Musk, the protection of Vance and the cabinet, and the rapid turnaround of the nation.
rawData: [January 25, 2025]-[Drawing closer to Jesus - don't allow the mixture in]-[https://youtu.be/8c3OFWnOS8E]-[Good morning, family. Praise the Lord. I just want to say thank you all. God bless every single one of you. Thank you for coming on here and praying with me every day; it's such a blessing. I've been seeking the Lord with all my heart the last couple of days, just looking for that fresh touch. So many people are desperate for a fresh touch from Jesus. The Lord has been dealing with me about prophetic voices and people in big ministries. I was caught in the spirit and saw many ministers, and the Lord said, 'Brandon, they don't know what's coming.' A lot of them don't know because they've allowed the pressure from the people and the pride of life to clog their spiritual ears. You're not able to hear—or you’re hearing only partially—something very vital for what's coming, but you're not hearing the depth of it. Then He showed me the people who say, 'Well, we're always going to pray away things; we're always going to stop things.' He was showing me that there are some things that are not going to be stopped, and yet it will catch a lot of you off guard because you're not hearing Him. Because of the fear of what you think is coming, you put the wall up, and God is saying, 'Warning, warning, warning.' There's a road out ahead, but you say, 'No, I'm going to pray against the road being out; I'm going to stop the road from being out with my prayer.' But the road is out, and you're going to keep driving that way because you think you're going to pray against the road that's out and change it, when God is just telling you to pause for a minute, listen to a new plan, and take time to get out of the car and climb. Does that make sense? The Lord was showing me a lot of prophetic voices that started out pure, but the more they got into ministry and the more the pressure and opinions of people came, they didn't filter it right. They didn't keep vertical, and because of this, they became a mixture. The more the mixture of the world comes in, you've got the Holy Spirit, but you're mixing it together. Instead of keeping Him first, ego sets in, and you think, 'I'm going to run this ministry; I'm going to do this the way that I think I should,' listening to Him partially. You've got one ear over here, but you don't have both ears to Him. I saw them getting a message from the Father, but it was only at a certain level. He showed me that as ministries got bigger, their reception antenna started to become out of tune. He said, 'They're not hearing Me in the higher levels in the throne room; they're picking it up down here, but they're not hearing Me in the throne room.' If you stop hearing Me in the throne room, you're going to get off-track; you're not getting the whole picture. It's like being a Watchman on the wall; you see the horizon, but you have blinders on. You're not able to see the whole landscape because you have patches on your eyes like a horse. You need to look at the whole landscape of what He's saying prophetically, but they're only getting a little bit because they've got all this stuff going on and they're not staying vertical with Him. The Lord said to me, 'Brandon, there are great dark things coming, but many of My people, because there's a mixture, I'm not able to get the pure thing through them anymore to warn My people for what's coming. You must stay vertical with Me and don't allow any mixture in.' He said this is vital. He said, 'I will not do anything in this world unless I reveal it to My prophets first,' but He can only reveal it to the ones who are vertical, keeping their eyes on Him and not allowing fame and ego to get in the way. When you start thinking it's you—the glove instead of the hand in the glove—He's not able to use you like He was before because the glove gets in the way. You've got to keep yourself and your ego out of the way. I saw many ministers who, as they got famous, became horizontal, looking at everybody else's praise, and stopped looking vertical. The Lord told me, 'There are many of My ministers that started out right, Brandon.' They started out with a pure heart before the Father, but you're going to see a house of cards fall with a lot of these ministries. You're going to see a cleaning of the house in 2025 and 2026—a great uncovering of darkness. It's vital for you ministers to always keep Jesus first and deflate your ego. It grieved me when He said to me that Saul started out good, but he let a mixture in until the anointing departed from him. He wanted the prophet to walk with him so they could pretend he still had it, but the anointing that was on his life had already left and gone to David. I told you the Davids are coming because the Sauls have lost the anointing. I saw so many of them behind the pulpit hearing a little bit, but it wasn't the whole message. Because of ego, fame, and money, they lost themselves in it and forgot to stay vertical. We pray for every one of them; we're not better than any of them, but there's a great shaking coming. I don't want to ever allow a platform to destroy my relationship with my Father; it's the most important thing to me. All this other stuff is just crap, quite frankly. It's about Him and me staying pliable and allowing the glove to be there for that hand, the Holy Spirit, to flow. As long as I keep my eyes on Him and deflect the glory and praise to the Father, I am just a vessel. Deflect the glory like a mirror; when the light shines on it, you just deflect it right to the Father. Ego stays out of the way because you're just like the donkey; he could have gotten arrogant because everyone was laying palm leaves at his feet, but it had nothing to do with him; it had everything to do with the One riding on his back. I'm desperate for more of Him. A lot of people don't get me, and big ministers reject me, but I don't care. It's not about me; it's about Jesus. I just want Him to say, 'Well done, thou good and faithful servant.' My job is to warn you, shouting it from the wall as loud as I can. Jesus is coming soon. No man knows the day or the hour, but He said to tell My people that time is running out. The Ark door is about to close, and many are going to be left behind. You must help me bring in My harvest. In these times of staying vertical, He said, 'Brandon, there's mixture today; I need you to separate yourself even more.' I get distracted with people pulling, but He said a greater wave is coming and I’m acclimating right now. Let's go higher. It's time to go higher. Ladies and gentlemen, He wants to use you too. Will you be that vessel? Will you allow the Holy Spirit to flow through you and not be a dam to reach the ones I would never have the opportunity to speak to? Your family might never turn on my YouTube channel, but they'll listen to you. Be bold in this hour, letting your voice be the one crying in the darkness. The Lord told me that the window for preaching the gospel freely on the internet is coming to a close soon. When the door closes, it will be closed forever. I don't know if it's four or five years, but He said this window of freedom of speech will come to an abrupt end. Right now, we have an opportunity to spread the gospel throughout the whole world. Some nations have shut me down—I can't tell the Muslim nations about Jesus, which grieves me—but China, South Korea, and Japan are still open. Will you help me bring in the harvest? Don't be afraid of what people think. It was hard for me to come on the internet for years, but I finally yielded and died to that fear. Jesus is coming, and many are not ready. He's no respecter of persons; what He does for me, He'll do for you. He wants a relationship with you, too. He loves you and has made a place for you in heaven. The Bible says the devil comes to kill, steal, and destroy, but the Lord came that you might have life more abundantly. The mind lies, but the Lord speaks to your spirit. You'll hear that still, small voice saying, 'I love you; I want to be your friend.' He knows about your deep, dark sorrows. He asked my wife the other day, 'Do you trust Me?' concerning Megan, our little girl who has autism. He asks hard questions all the time. When you have a child with special needs and she's still non-verbal, and the Lord asks, 'Do you trust Me?' I had to say, 'Lord, I believe; help my unbelief.' I don't see a natural way out, but Abraham staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief. I know many of you are discouraged because you haven't seen your breakthrough yet. I live it every day. There's so much fakeness in the body of Christ, pretending everyone has it together, but some days you don't. We've come a long way, but we're still going through the fire. When you go through hell and keep on going, it's like Diana said: 'We're not parking here; we're going to put it in four-wheel drive and keep going.' When you get real with God, He'll get real with you. I told you we're all on the potter's wheel, just a work in progress; Diana and I are, too. Let me give you the opportunity to accept Jesus. Say: 'Father, I'm a sinner; I need a Savior. Forgive me of my sins and write my name in the Lamb's Book of Life. I believe You're the Son of God, You died and rose again. I make You my Lord and personal Savior today. I denounce Satan and everything he stands for.' Now, go to a Bible-believing church, get baptized, and tell somebody what you've done today. The word of God will change you from the inside out. Draw close to Him, and He'll draw close to you. Thank you for the half a million subscribers; I believe you're here because of Him. Father, we thank You for every person watching. Thank You for the opportunity to tell them You're coming. We stay vertical and humble ourselves. Create in us a clean heart. We're coming up higher and cleaning out our spiritual ears. We call healing and wholeness over our bodies today. Touch those who are hurting—mentally, emotionally, physically, financially. We are the salt that makes people thirsty for Jesus. We deflect the glory back to You. We pray that Elon Musk is saved, the cabinet and Vance are protected, and that we turn this nation around quickly. Supply all our needs according to Your riches and glory. Even things that seem impossible, You're making possible today. In Jesus' name, amen. If you're new here, welcome. Click the like and subscribe buttons. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you. Bye-bye.]
